episode_name: Operation Orion direct-violence window in Comuna 13
geographic_scope: urban security operation across contested sectors of Comuna 13
theater_description: Comuna 13 / San Javier in Medellín during the initial 16-17 October 2002 intervention by public force units, with documented paramilitary collaboration in the broader operation.
geometry_method_note: The event is bounded to the directly contested urban sectors of Comuna 13 during the initial intervention, not the whole city of Medellín.
military_area_note: More than 1,500 public-force personnel are mentioned in memory sources, but combatant-victim status is disputed and some official counts mix civilians and militiamen.
civilian_area_note: No whole-comuna denominator is used because the directly exposed civilian population under fire is unresolved.
split_reason: A single direct-violence episode is stronger than mixing the initial operation with later detentions, disappearances, and paramilitary consolidation.
quality_note: Source-rich but casualty attribution is too inconsistent for a publishable formal DR or even a clean fallback.
